Private villa architecture — Jeddah

We design private villas and homes in Jeddah and the Gulf

A boutique architecture studio for private villa clients in Jeddah — refined modern design, a careful eye for stone, light and proportion, and a close understanding of how families live in Jeddah and across the Gulf.

We begin with a free call and a free preliminary concept — a paid agreement starts only once the direction is clear and aligned.

Villa design in Jeddah

The starting point for landowners and families: how we design a private villa in Jeddah from concept to construction.

Luxury villa design in Jeddah

For luxury villas that balance privacy, hospitality, refined detail and long-term value.

Learn more →

Modern villa design in Jeddah

Clean lines, natural light and a seamless indoor–outdoor relationship — for clients who prefer modern architecture.

Learn more →

Obhur villa design

For coastal plots in Obhur and North Jeddah: sea light, waterfront privacy and outdoor living.

Learn more →

Modern Hijazi villa design

Reinterpreting Hijazi architecture — rawasheen, courtyards and stone — in a modern language for life today.

Learn more →

Approach

Read the full approach →

A clear three-step path that keeps decisions calm and progress steady — before any paid commitment.

  1. 01

    Free call to review the plot

    A review of the plot and lifestyle goals, with a clear definition of the home you want to live in.

  2. 02

    Free preliminary concept

    We discuss the initial direction on a video call before any commitment — an architectural concept and interior atmosphere aligned with your priorities.

  3. 03

    Paid agreement only after alignment

    If the direction is right, we move into the agreement and detailed design — a design package that leads consultants and contractors with clarity.

Wael Bousmael

Architect and BIM coordinator with 12+ years of experience in luxury residential villas, with projects delivered in Germany, Lebanon and Saudi Arabia — from first concept to construction documentation.

More about the studio →

Ready to review your plot?

A free call, then a free preliminary concept — we only begin a paid agreement after the direction is clear and aligned.
